PAI-SAFE Pass 7

Read-Only Preview Harness

This static preview consumes exported Pass 6 fixture JSON. It does not run transaction logic, create truth, authorize payment, write custody, call external APIs, or mutate ProofBack Protection records.

Circuit decides Projection reflects Surface contract maps Screen state prepares Fixture packet exports Preview reads fixtures UI renders later

Fixture Scenario

SAFE

Fixture ID: pai_safe_fixture_safe

Merchant Preview

This transaction is marked safe for this advisory pass.

Fulfill with confidence

Transaction
txn_fixture_safe
Decision
SAFE
State
SAFE_STATE
Fulfillment
Ready to fulfill
Proof
Proof available
Reason
No blocking issue detected
Dispute Support
Proof record available for transaction support.

Allowed Actions

  • VIEW_RECEIPT
  • VIEW_PROOF_STATUS
  • FULFILL_TRANSACTION

Timeline

  • Transaction request created
  • Advisory trust check completed
  • ProofBack Protection record generated
  • Proof-backed receipt issued

Read-only. No payment, custody, or trust mutation authority.

Consumer Preview

This transaction is marked safe for this advisory pass.

This transaction passed the advisory safety check and has a proof-backed record.

Fixture Scenario

REFUSED

Fixture ID: pai_safe_fixture_refused

Merchant Preview

This transaction is refused for this advisory pass.

Do not fulfill

Transaction
txn_fixture_refused
Decision
REFUSED
State
REFUSED_STATE
Fulfillment
Do not fulfill
Proof
Refusal record available
Reason
Destination integrity issue
Dispute Support
Refusal record available. Do not fulfill.

Allowed Actions

  • VIEW_RECEIPT
  • VIEW_PROOF_STATUS
  • DO_NOT_FULFILL

Timeline

  • Transaction request created
  • Advisory trust check completed
  • ProofBack Protection record generated
  • Proof-backed receipt issued

Read-only. No payment, custody, or trust mutation authority.

Consumer Preview

This transaction is refused for this advisory pass.
